name: Crawler crawling (three quarter, mid)
prompt:
A real, natural-light photograph of a real subject — shot outdoors in soft, even daylight with a full tonal range from clean shadows to bright highlights, true-to-life skin, fur, and surface texture, sharp and in focus. It looks like an ordinary, believable photo, absolutely NOT an illustration, drawing, painting, sketch, comic, 3D render, CGI, sculpture, statue, figurine, or toy.
A photograph of a pale emaciated humanoid crawler on all fours with elongated limbs, crawling low, head raised, seen from a three-quarter angle, photographed from a moderate distance.
Framed with clear empty space all around it — the whole thing sits comfortably within the frame and does NOT touch or run off any edge.
Unsettling but wholly believable as a real photo: weathered aged materials and organic surface detail caught by a documentary camera, not stylized.
Exactly one subject, centered, nothing else in frame.
Isolated on a fully transparent background, the entire subject visible and uncropped, with soft naturally feathered edges suitable for dropping into another photograph.
No text, no watermark, no caption, no border, no frame, no sticker sheet, no collage.
negative_prompt: illustration, drawing, sketch, line art, comic, cartoon, anime, painting, digital painting, concept art, poster, sticker, vector art, cel shaded, 3d render, cgi, octane render, sculpture, statue, figurine, clay, toy, plastic, stylized, cartoonish, film grain, heavy noise, motion blur, vignette, drop shadow, glow, rim light, text, watermark, logo, caption, border, frame, background, scenery, sky, ground, landscape, buildings, people, multiple subjects, sticker sheet, grid, collage, cropped, cut off, white background, colored background, gore, blood
